description: Leading end-to-end data product strategy and backlog management within technical data grids. Directed the migration of high-volume legacy deposit data tables into cloud architectures, driving cross-functional PI planning across four distinct workstreams. Successfully engineered automated validation controls and data-scrubbing loops that reduced downstream exceptions by 35%, ensuring high-fidelity, audit-ready data asset governance.

Specialized in data analytics, pipeline optimization, and infrastructure velocity. Focused on translating complex compliance, risk, and financial requirements into scalable technical roadmaps. Championed automated engineering workflows, including designing a custom GenAI framework that reduced ad-hoc data development overhead and query setup time by 40-50%.
